overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a character with white hair and blue vest exploring the Ravenclaw common room and adjacent dormitories. The environment features Gothic architecture with vaulted blue ceilings, stone archways, and wooden staircases. The character moves through multiple rooms and corridors, descending spiral staircases and entering sleeping quarters with four-poster beds.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room with high vaulted ceiling

events.description: character approaches and opens wooden door to enter dormitory corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room towards an arched doorway, passing wooden bookshelves and banners

notable_agents.action: seated in armchair reading near the balcony railing

entered.detail: high Gothic vaulted ceiling painted blue with gold accents and ribbed arches
large circular blue rug with gold astrological patterns
large pointed Gothic arch leading to darker corridor
tall wooden bookcases filled with books along the curved wall
upholstered reading chair with wooden frame near the railing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the Ravenclaw common room, a grand circular space with a high blue vaulted ceiling and ornate Gothic architecture. The character walks across a blue astrological carpet toward a stone archway, passing wooden bookshelves and an NPC seated in an armchair. Natural light filters through tall windows as the character approaches a wooden door at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: student dormitory with multiple four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dormitory, observing the beds and window seats

entered.detail: wooden four-poster beds with blue draped curtains and white bedding
tall pointed arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
heavy blue fabric drapes framing the windows
study desk with books and magical artifacts
cushioned bench built into the window alcove

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy dormitory room featuring multiple four-poster beds with blue curtains and tall Gothic windows that let in soft natural light. The space has wooden floors, window seats with cushions, and study desks. The character moves slowly through the room, examining the sleeping quarters and furnishings before heading toward the exit.

events.description: exits dormitory into narrow stone corridor with wooden staircase
begins descending the spiral wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: exiting the dormitory and walking down a narrow spiral staircase with wooden steps and stone walls

entered.detail: narrow winding wooden staircase with carved bannister
rough-hewn grey stone block walls with wooden wainscoting
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory through a wooden door into a narrow stone corridor, then begins descending a spiral wooden staircase. The lighting shifts to artificial wall-mounted lanterns as the environment becomes more enclosed with rough stone walls and carved wooden railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level landing with armor display and grand staircase

events.description: reaches lower landing with suit of armor and circular rug

agents.ego_description: continuing down the stairs past a landing with a suit of armor, then descending another flight

entered.detail: full suit of medieval plate armor standing on display
round woven rug with intricate patterns on wooden floor
wide wooden staircase with ornate carved railings leading downward

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a lower landing featuring a decorative suit of armor and a circular woven rug. The space opens slightly with a grand staircase visible to the left. The character continues down another flight of wooden stairs, passing wall sconces and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: second dormitory with bunk beds and study areas

events.description: enters second dormitory room through wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with a painting, then entering a second dormitory with bunk beds and looking around

entered.detail: large framed oil painting of a lake and mountains in golden frame
wooden bunk beds with blue curtains and ladder
large storage chest at foot of bed
blue and bronze house crest banner hanging on wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor featuring a large landscape painting, then enters a second dormitory room. This chamber contains bunk beds with blue curtains, Gothic windows, wooden chests, and house banners. The character explores the space, walking past study desks and potted plants near the tall windows.

events.description: exits dormitory back into stone corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the second dormitory and descending another wooden staircase through a narrow stone passage

entered.detail: narrow passage with grey stone walls and wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the second dormitory into a narrow stone corridor, then continues descending a wooden staircase. The environment returns to artificial lighting with wall-mounted lanterns illuminating the rough stone walls as the character moves deeper into the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grand, light-filled common room through a series of intimate dormitories and descending stone corridors. It begins in a circular hall with a high blue vaulted ceiling and astrological carpets, moving past bookshelves and an NPC toward a wooden door. As the character enters a cozy dormitory, the scene shifts to a space of four-poster beds and soft natural light before transitioning back into a narrow stone corridor where the lighting becomes artificial and the camera descends a spiral wooden staircase. The path then opens briefly at a landing with a suit of armor before winding through another corridor and into a second dormitory filled with bunk beds and house banners. Finally, the camera exits this chamber and descends further down another wooden staircase, moving deeper into the structure as wall-mounted lanterns illuminate the rough stone walls.
